meta.title: Bundled and local feishu plugins share the same plugin id
meta.summary: Detect duplicate local feishu plugin state before OpenClaw loads conflicting plugins.
preflight.summary: Detected an extra local feishu plugin that conflicts with the bundled feishu plugin.
preflight.detail.installRef: openclaw.json still contains an explicit feishu install reference.
preflight.detail.allowMissing: plugins.allow is empty or missing, so non-bundled plugins may still be auto-discovered.
suggestion.doctor: Run `openclaw plugins doctor` to review plugin health.
suggestion.repair: Run `guardian repair feishu-dup --dry-run` to inspect the planned fix.
repair.noop.summary: No duplicate local feishu plugin state was detected.
repair.dryRun.summary: Dry-run prepared a repair plan for the duplicate local feishu plugin state.
repair.apply.summary: Applied the repair plan for the duplicate local feishu plugin state.
repair.action.backupExtension: Move local extension from {from} to backup location {to}.
repair.action.removeInstallRef: Remove the explicit `plugins.installs.feishu` reference from openclaw.json.
repair.warning.allowMissing: plugins.allow is still empty or missing. This repair does not rewrite your allowlist automatically.
